chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. D- 779 of 2014. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judg 03.03.2022. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. Mr. Ashfaq Hussain Abro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Imdad Ali Mashori, Advocate for private respondent. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl. A.G. ~~~~~~~ At the very outset, it is stated by the learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press disposal of instant petition before this Court on merit, if Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Shahdadkot, is directed to provide true copies of revenue entries, if those are found available in relevant record in name of his late brother Amjad Ali alias Javed Ali, in accordance with law, which is not opposed by learned Addl.A.G and learned counsel for the private respondent. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ansari
